member.name: T:WorldSphereAPI
member.summary: WorldSphereMod API Calller. Compatible with both upstream WorldSphereMod (v1) and the WorldSphereMod3D fork (v2). v2-only members fall back to safe defaults when connected to a v1 host.

member.name: P:WorldSphereAPI.IsWorld3D
member.summary: returns true if the world Is 3D

member.name: P:WorldSphereAPI.IsModel3D
member.summary: returns true if the v2 mesh pipeline is active (voxel/procgen meshes, not just camera-billboarded sprites). False on v1 hosts.

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.GetVersion
member.summary: Returns the host API version string when available. Falls back to unknown on older hosts that do not expose discovery methods.

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.GetCapabilities
member.summary: Returns the set of host capabilities exposed through the discovery surface. Older hosts return an empty set.

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.HasFeature(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true when the connected host advertises . Older hosts safely return false.

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.RegisterCustomMesh(System.String,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Override the auto-voxelized mesh for a given asset id. No-op on v1 hosts.
member.param: A UnityEngine.Mesh instance (typed as object to keep this assembly Unity-free)

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.RegisterBuildingRules(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Override the procgen heuristic rules for a building asset (Phase 2). Pass a BuildingRules instance typed as — external callers can either copy the BuildingRules struct definition locally or use reflection against the host assembly. No-op on v1 hosts.

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.GetSetting``1(System.String)
member.remarks: refer to SavedSettings.cs in the Mod Code to view all the settings
member.typeparam: the type of the setting, this can be a boolean, float or an integer

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.MakeActorNonUpright(System.String)
member.summary: Makes a actor with asset non upright, it will face towards the ground and not rotate to the camera

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.MakeBuildingNonUpright(System.String)
member.summary: Makes a building with asset non upright, it will face towards the ground and not rotate to the camera

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.MakeProjectileNonUpright(System.String)
member.summary: Makes a projectile with asset non upright, it will face towards the ground and not rotate to the camera

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.EditEffect(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: edits the data of an effect that worldspheremod uses
member.param: the asset ID of the effect
if upright, the effect will be rotated upright and can rotate towards the camera, like nukes for example

if true, worldspheremod will make the spriterenderer of your effect completly seperate, any changes to your effect wll translate over to the spriterenderer, and the spriterenderer will be in 3D space, and have rotations
how high off the ground the effect will be
if true, the base height of the effect is the height of the tile it is on, otherwise the base height is 0

member.name: M:WorldSphereAPI.Connect(WorldSphereAPI@)
member.summary: Connects to WorldSphereMod, if it is in the Game
member.remarks: only use this in post init
